mapper.insert: insert into news (log_date, title, source, photo, content, user_id) values (#{logDate},#{title},#{source},#{photo},#{content},#{userId})
mapper.select: select *,user_info.user_name as username from news left join user_info on news.user_id = user_info.user_id
select *, user_info.user_name as username from news left join user_info ON news.user_id = user_info.user_id where news_id = #{newsId} ORDER BY news_id DESC
